LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT PAUL BAILEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED TO THE EXTENT IT IS BASED ON WHETHER PLAINTIFF HAS PLED COMPLIANCE WITH THE TORT CLAIMS ACT. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED COMPLIANCE AT PAGE 2 OF THE COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT PAUL BAILEY'S INVOLVEMENT IN AND LIABILITY FOR THE ACTS COMPLAINED OF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT PAUL BAILEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. The demurrer is overruled to the extent it is based on whether Plaintiff has pled compliance with the Tort Claims Act. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled compliance at page 2 of the Complaint. The demurrer is sustained with 15 days leave to amend on all other grounds for Plaintiff to plead facts showing Defendant Paul Bailey's involvement in and liability for the acts complained of. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES:

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
